result.grok_ui_message: 응답 없음. Grok이 응답을 완료하지 못했습니다. 잠시 후 다시 시도하거나 다른 모델을 사용해 보세요.
result.observation: APF blocks Grok API POST to conversations/new with 403 Forbidden. Background GET requests to user-skills also blocked. Grok shows its own error UI but no APF warning page/message displayed.

notes: Phase3-B4 retest #3 after etapd restart and DB template memory reflection. Same result as #099/#103 - block works but no warning.
